arts.ttl: Ronald Araujo named in Barcelona squad after five months out
arts.sum: Ronald Araujo has been included in Barcelona's squad for their Champions League clash with Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Barcelona predictions: Barca to get the better of BVB
arts.sum: Barcelona face a tough test at Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League, but Jamie Griffith expects the Catalan giants to get the job done in Germany.

arts.ttl: VfB Stuttgart view Paul Wanner as a potential replacement for Enzo Millot as Borussia Dortmund show interest in the Frenchman
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that VfB Stuttgart are preparing for the potential departure of Enzo Millot in the summer and see Paul Wanner as an option. Millot has a release clause valued…

arts.ttl: Araujo passed fit and returns to Barca squad for UCL clash
arts.sum: We’ll have to wait and see if Araujo makes his long-awaited return against Dortmund, as it’s previously been reported he will make the trip but is unlikely to feature. Flick has also said it’s most likely that Araujo will make his first appearance of the season at the weekend when they team face Leganes in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs. Barcelona: UEFA Champions League probable teams, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will have nothing to fear when they welcome Hansi Flick's Barcelona and ex-BVB striker Robert Lewandowski to Signal Iduna Park in the UEFA Champions League on Wednesday (kick-off: 9pm CET). Lewandowski scored 103 goals in 187 competitive appearances for Dortmund, before putting more goals past BVB than any club he's faced during an eight year-spell at Bayern (27 in 26 games).

arts.ttl: Report: Dortmund join race for Millot, Stuttgart eye Wanner as replacement
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, Borussia Dortmund have joined the race for Enzo Millot, while VfB Stuttgart are considering Bayern Munich youngster Paul Wanner as a possible replacement.

arts.ttl: Big data speaks: how Real Madrid, Barcelona, Man City, Liverpool... will finish in the Champions League
arts.sum: Below is the predicted table for the Champions League league phase after eight matchdays, according to the most probable points tallies assigned to each of the 36 participants and their current goal differences: Based on the points forecasted for each team at the end of the league phase and their current goal differences, we can sketch a potential table.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners set to battle Barcelona for star as defender bid rejected
arts.sum: Arsenal may be pondering a few signings that could boost their title hopes after falling six points behind Premier League leaders Liverpool following their disappointing 1-1 draw with Fulham on Sunday

arts.ttl: When is Dortmund - Barcelona? How to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Dortmund - Barcelona will be played on Wednesday December 11 at Signal Iduna Park with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12: 00 p.m PT . Barcelona, has been in excellent form, leading La Liga and performing consistently in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: When is Barcelona - Leganés? Times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Leganés suffered a tough loss against Real Sociedad in their last game. They had a couple of mixed results of late, tying their latest game 2-2 against Betis .
